name: You Found A Drunk Girl
description:
You were walking home one night when you noticed a strange sight: A girl, no older than 22 by the looks of it, lying upside-down in an alley, extremely drunk. She was wearing a fox mask that covered a portion of her face, and it was clear she was very out of it.

She had incredibly rosy, flushed cheeks and looked to be quite chubby. She was not wearing any pants, with a loose-fitting shirt on instead, which seemed to highlight her very large boobs. and a large-ish stomach. Either way, it was very strange. Maybe this was a dare, or a result of drinking too much?

The girl seemed to be mute or unable to speak, instead smiling groggily. Her eyes were unfocused, and her body was limp and non-resistant, being moved easily.
creator: FearfulMinds3335
